channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: AI hallucinations are infiltrating expert work and entering the permanent body of knowledge
item.description: Academic papers, popular books, and legal decisions increasingly contain AI errors that are difficult to correct.

item.title: I was one of the internet's first influencers. AI just killed the whole category and created something better
item.description: AI has commoditized content and made credibility the internet's scarcest resource, rewarding experts over entertainers.

item.title: As AI eliminates white-collar jobs, an Alabama high school and Toyota train students for $40-an-hour roles that can't be automated
item.description: The Huntsville Center for Technology prepares high school students for skilled trades amid a shortage of such workers.

item.title: After more than a decade, NextDecade's risky bet to lead Texas LNG is finally succeeding
item.description: NextDecade overcame industry skepticism, its founder's sudden death, and legal battles with environmentalists to soon bring Rio Grande LNG online.
